summary: Iteration 59: Tested Smartflo Agent Mapping CRUD, Call Outcomes, and AI Analysis features. Fixed critical bug in log_activity() calls that was causing 500 errors on agent create/update/delete. All 13 backend tests pass. All UI features verified working.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: log_activity() calls in Smartflo agent CRUD endpoints had incorrect argument order - was causing 500 errors
Correct signature: log_activity(action, entity_type, entity_id, user, details)
Was incorrectly called as: log_activity(user['id'], action_string, message_string)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed log_activity() calls in Smartflo agent CRUD endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test agents created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_Agent_* prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 tested new Smartflo features. All working correctly after bug fix. Key findings: 1) Smartflo Agents page at /admin/smartflo-agents shows 11 mapped agents with full CRUD operations. 2) Calls Dashboard shows Outcome column with '+ Add' buttons and AI column with brain icons. 3) AI Analysis dialog shows 'Run AI Analysis' button for calls with recordings. 4) Backend endpoints all working: GET /api/smartflo/agents/list, POST /api/smartflo/agents, PUT /api/smartflo/agents/{id}, DELETE /api/smartflo/agents/{id}, GET /api/smartflo/call-outcomes, PUT /api/smartflo/calls/{id}/outcome, POST /api/smartflo/calls/{id}/analyze

smartflo_agents_page.details: Page accessible at /admin/smartflo-agents, shows 11 agents with all columns (Name, Phone, Smartflo #, Department, CRM User, API Key, Status, Actions)

add_agent_dialog.details: Add Agent button opens dialog with all form fields: CRM User dropdown, Agent Name, Department, Phone Number, Smartflo Agent Number, Email, Click-to-Call API Key, Active toggle

edit_delete_actions.details: 11 Edit buttons and 11 Delete buttons found in Actions column

backend_agent_crud.details: All CRUD operations working: list, create, update, delete. Duplicate prevention working.

calls_dashboard_outcome_column.details: Outcome column visible with 7 '+ Add' buttons for calls without outcomes

calls_dashboard_ai_column.details: AI column visible with 3 brain icons for calls with recordings

outcome_dialog.details: Outcome dialog opens with dropdown (12 outcomes) and notes field

ai_analysis_dialog.details: AI Analysis dialog opens with 'Run AI Analysis' button, shows call details (Caller, Time, Duration)

backend_call_outcomes.details: GET /api/smartflo/call-outcomes returns 12 outcomes with value, label, category

backend_ai_analysis.details: POST /api/smartflo/calls/{id}/analyze endpoint exists and responds correctly

bug_fixed.description: log_activity() function calls in Smartflo agent CRUD endpoints had incorrect argument order
bug_fixed.root_cause: The log_activity() function signature is (action, entity_type, entity_id, user, details) but the calls were using (user['id'], action_string, message_string)
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Updated all three calls (create, update, delete) to use correct argument order
